handlers.description: Performs a pre-action check against ThumbGate rules including budget enforcement, self-protection, pattern blocking, and mistake prevention
Records a thumbs-up or thumbs-down for an action and generates prevention rules for thumbs-down
Checks and enforces budget limits, blocking actions that exceed the budget
Checks for repeat patterns in history and blocks actions if a pattern is detected
Returns the current ThumbGate system status including version, active checks, and supported agents
Manages prevention rules - add, remove, or list rules
